query: Generate an image of a sunset over the ocean with dramatic clouds
rationale: Classic text-to-image generation — core use case

query: Create a photorealistic picture of a golden retriever wearing a top hat
rationale: Text-to-image with specific creative details

query: I have this product photo and I want you to remove the background and replace it with a clean white studio backdrop
rationale: AI-powered image editing — requires understanding image content to isolate subject

query: Can you take this headshot and make it look like an oil painting in the style of Rembrandt?
rationale: Style transfer — needs AI generation model

query: I need a hero banner for my website — something abstract and colorful, 1920x1080, tech vibes
rationale: Image generation with dimension specification — the dimensions are for the generated output

query: Take these three reference photos of my cat and generate a new image of the cat sitting on the moon
rationale: Multi-reference image generation — clause 5 of original description

query: Use Nano Banana to create a logo concept for my coffee shop called Brew & Bean
rationale: Explicitly names Nano Banana — should trigger on model name

query: I want to add a rainbow to this landscape photo, just arcing over the mountains
rationale: AI inpainting/editing — adding a creative element to an existing image

query: Generate a set of 4 variations of this logo with different color palettes using Gemini
rationale: AI-powered variation generation with explicit Gemini mention

query: Create a before/after comparison image showing a house renovation, I'll describe both scenes
rationale: Creative image generation from detailed text instructions

query: Resize this image to 800x600 pixels
rationale: Simple mechanical resize — ImageMagick/PIL territory, not AI generation

query: I need to make my profile picture smaller, like 200x200 for the avatar upload
rationale: Thumbnail/avatar resize — no AI needed

query: Can you convert this PNG to JPEG and reduce the file size?
rationale: Format conversion and compression — purely mechanical

query: Crop the center 500x500 square from this 1920x1080 image
rationale: Geometric crop operation — deterministic, no AI

query: I have 50 product images in /data/uploads/ and need them all resized to 300x300 with white padding
rationale: Batch resize with padding — classic ImageMagick batch job, not generation

query: Rotate this image 90 degrees clockwise and flip it horizontally
rationale: Geometric transform — rotate and flip are deterministic operations

query: Change the aspect ratio of this photo from 4:3 to 16:9 by adding letterbox bars
rationale: Aspect ratio change via letterboxing — mechanical padding, not AI. This is the exact false-trigger scenario described in the problem.

query: Make a thumbnail of this image for my blog post, 150px wide
rationale: Thumbnail generation — resize with preserved aspect ratio

query: I need to optimize all the images on my website for faster loading — compress them and serve webp
rationale: Image optimization/compression pipeline — infrastructure work, not generation

query: Strip the EXIF metadata from these photos before I upload them to the forum
rationale: Metadata manipulation — no visual changes at all, purely mechanical
